ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO JURISDICTION IN THIS COURT. PLAINTIFF SCOTT SIMONS INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF FOKS, NEIGHBORHOOD GROUP IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SUZANNE MARRIA INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF FOKS, NEIGHBORHOOD GROUP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY CLINTON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAUL WLLIAMS DAWSON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAWSON/CLINTON GENERAL CONTRACTORS GROUP LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT 939 KANSAS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT 945 KANSAS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATASHA SADEGHI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM ALLOWD BY JUDGE TONG. DEFENDANT LUCAS EASTWOOD IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALISHA EASTWOOD, WIFE VIA ZOOM ALLOWD BY JUDGE TONG. DEFENDANT DANIEL COSTER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARA MEAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REAL SF PROPERTIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RANDALL N KOSTICK, BROOKER. DEFENDANT RANDALL N KOSTICK RESPONIBLE BROOKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL RICHARDO FERNANDEZ AKA DANIEL RICHARDO FERNANDEZ ACEBO IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON 945 KANSAS LLC AND DANIEL COSTER THEREFORE PLAINTIFFS DISMISSED CASES WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEHEARD IN THIS COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
